title: Dead-letter Envelope
description: Wraps an event that failed validation in BaseAgent._dispatch(). Published to 'deadletter.<subject>' and watched by Beacon. The outer envelope is strict so consumers can rely on it; the inner 'payload' is intentionally free-form because it is the exact data that failed its own contract.

id.description: Original event id, preserved for replay.

subject.description: Original subject the event failed on.

source.description: Agent that emitted the failed event.

correlation_id.description: Business-transaction id, kept so a quarantined event stays traceable end to end.

payload.description: The original, unmodified payload that failed validation. Free-form by design.

error.description: Validation error message that caused the dead-letter.
